attractions.name: Yala National Park
attractions.description: Sri Lanka's most famous national park, known for having one of the highest leopard densities in the world. Wildlife includes leopards, elephants, crocodiles, peacocks, hornbills, and exotic birds.
attractions.entry_fee: LKR 15,000–20,000 per jeep (park fees + vehicle, approx.)

hotels.name: Chaarya Lake Resort
hotels.location: Near Yala National Park, beside tranquil waters
